---
title: "ANAC_DECEA COMPARISON"
---

COMPARISON BETWEEN DECEA AND ANAC FLIGHT DATA IN JANUARY


```{r}

install.packages("flightsbr")
library(flightsbr)
library(dplyr)

dfanac <- read_flights(date = 202501)
dfanac |> 
  group_by(nr_mes_partida_real) |> 
  reframe(N= n())




# DECEA


dfdecea <- read.csv2("./data-src/movement_data_2023_2024_2025.csv")

dfdecea |> 
     filter(MÊS == 1 ,ANO_INICIO_BRT == 2025) |> 
     group_by(MÊS) |> 
     reframe(N = sum(TOTAL))
